result.stdout:
Description:
  Write updates to a file

Usage:
  LiveFile [options]

Options:
  --countdown-to <countdown-to>        The target time to count down to
  --end-message <end-message>          The message to display when the count down is not running. []
  --timer-format <timer-format>        The format for the time display. Any valid C# format string. [default: {0:mm\:ss}]
  --output-file <output-file>          The file to write to. [default: output.txt]
  --keep-file                          Delete file when program terminates. [default: False]
  --verbosity <Detailed|Normal|Quiet>  The verbosity of the output [default: Normal]
  --version                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
